title: Starbounded
description: We're not meant to save the world  — We're meant to leave it
body:
**THIS MOD IS IN ALPHA — MOST IF NOT ALL FEATURES MENTIONED ARE STILL IN DEVELOPMENT!**

p.s don't look at the screenshots they're very outdated :( join the discord server for updates. The uploads are also very outdated. Ill make an announcement 
when the full release comes out with all the stuff below.

### **Starbounded: Far Above the Moon**

![Explore the Unexplored!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07f20b3c417c5991103cc5247510267c6bee491a.png)


    **Starbounded** is a space mod for adventurers, innovators, and people tired of the classical notion of modded space mods. **Starbounded** offers content in a way that is immersive, unique, and truly original (in most cases). From complex technological systems of power generation and resource production, to distinctive implementation of planets, moons, and even pulsars, every aspect of **Starbounded** has a purpose — a reason to be there. Spanning from the **Salt-Peter** found inside the Earth's crust to the far civilizations in the **Centauri Star System**, all aspects of the mod have purpose and potential for scalability. 

---

    **Starbounded** employs a custom tech tree that scales all the way from the early game on Earth to a lore-based end game in the **Andromeda Galaxy**. The lore is optional, of course, but it adds a unique sense of layer to the mod's atmosphere and ultra-powerful gear and mechanics that are only possible through its completion. 

---

    **Starbounded** adds a plethora of custom materials, blocks, and machines all obtained through the custom tech tree. These custom materials include but are not limited to most Elements on the periodic table, real-life compounds (**Ammonia**, **Methane**, **Sulfuric Acid**, etc…), and many composite materials (**Reinforced Magnetized Steel**, **Stainless Steel**, **Kevlar**, etc…). Alongside materials, machines such as **Chemical Refineries**, **Oil pumps**, **Atmospheric Extractors**, and many more are all accessible through the **custom tech tree**. 

---

    **Starbounded** is meant to be automated! The goal of **Starbounded** is to set up interplanetary automation through resource transportation, management, and production. For example, inexhaustible sulfuric acid deposits beneath Venus's surface are transported to a factory on Mars, where they are mixed with magnesium mined locally. The resulting compound is then transported to the Moon for use in anti-gravity reaction processes.

---

    A space mod wouldn’t be a space mod without space travel, even if it has the most **automation** in the world! Starbounded adds a custom **modular** spacecraft creation system, allowing you to assemble your ship **block by block**. With the immense amount of rocket parts at your disposal (**Fins**, **Nose's**, **Fuselage**, **Thruster Tiers**, **Side Boosters**, etc…), your creativity will have no bounds! (except for stars… **starbounded**!11!)

---

    **Starbounded** features numerous references from **TV shows**, **video games**, **books**, and **movies**. You’ll discover nods to **classics** such as _Stargate_, _Farscape_, _Dune_, and many more! Especially in the lore ;)

---

    **Starbounded** adds so much more than this. It is more than a Minecraft mod, rather an experience to be **enjoyed**. Starbounded adds special **world gen**, **ore gen**, new **mobs**, new **weapons** and **tools**, new **dimensions** (no, not minecraft dimensions :) ). You can inflict space wars with **satellite space lasers**, **interplanetary cannons**, and **weaponized EM waves**. Create **space stations** in orbit that are fully **self-sustainable**. All with an **endless** galaxy to explore, to conque, to thrive, and to most importantly, be **bound** to. 

---
